title: Sociohydro flood complaints reproducibility package
description: Reproducibility package for the manuscript 'Event-dependent coupling between extreme rainfall and institutionalized civic response: Evidence from administrative complaints in South Korea'. The archive contains code, aggregated datasets, figure-level processed source files, tables, figures, and documentation. Raw complaint texts are excluded because they are legally restricted under the ACRC data-use agreement and privacy law. Reproducibility is therefore provided at the highest shareable analytical level through de-identified aggregates, minimal reproducible subsets, synthetic smoke-test inputs, and figure-specific processed inputs.
